textByHashes.9ab7de1ddfb0a0e956e8bb38ef9be6f28a5f18f0: Sssshhh... the gods are talking. I can hear their whispers.
textByHashes.f395cf5b043e3679c18beae8935f56519fb2c2c0: Can you hear them adventurer, they're calling you.
textByHashes.1f60c72b6534ae6d05db0e2dbcfdea642abafafd: Go chant at the statue of the god you most wish to represent in this world, you will be rewarded.
textByHashes.d37e659e8c9ebf8e91e2c3fe436aa40ab47343f1: Once you are done, come back to me. I shall supply you with a mage staff ready for battle.
textByHashes.98678138226bb62897b2a71bfbd0c1bbc403b289: Hello adventurer, have you made your choice?
textByHashes.7fc6fc1768aea1b257d24625b280436db89a7488: Good, good, I hope you have chosen well. Have you been rewarded with a cape from your chosen god?
textByHashes.9978bedb636366eb8b755b570484cabd87a4b464: Once you have your cape come back to me, and I shall supply you with a mage staff ready for battle.
textByHashes.c67ac8599419da2d9872d9a42020f47097edf643: Good, good, I hope you have chosen well. I will now present you with a magic staff. This, along with the cape awarded to you by your chosen god, are all the weapons and armour you will need here.
textByHashes.48fc0c0d690c18c0e2e1cbfe53db31d2b147053a: Hello adventurer, are you looking for another staff?
textByHashes.c54fbe5504ae3e3feb67d44a85f1db51ce0a4b64: Well let me know if you need one.
textByHashes.ced6a9e56ef0cc6212da3a1234583e0c5ac58d2e: We believe the spells are gifts from the gods. The charge spell draws even more power from the cosmos.
textByHashes.9f7b3e406bf2b95a5689118db2b14dc522eabe27: While wearing a matching cape and staff it will add 50% more damage to that already caused by battle mage spells for several minutes.
